title: How a Man of God Kills the Sin He's Stopped Feeling Guilty About
caption:
The sins that still make you flinch, you fight. The ones you've made peace with, you feed without noticing. Numbness isn't victory. It's the sin winning quietly enough that you stopped keeping score.

Scripture never said manage it. It said kill it. Put to death whatever belongs to your earthly nature. (Colossians 3:5) Not tame it, not negotiate with it. Kill it, the way you'd kill anything actively trying to kill you back.

Name the thing you've stopped naming. Say the actual word, out loud or on paper. Not "a struggle." Not "an area." Vague confession produces vague repentance.

Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed. (James 5:16) The sin that survives is always the one nobody else knows about.

Tell one man this week.

#faith #christianmen #repentance #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #discipline
